title: Dawn Of The Dead: Return Of Zombie Tech Stocks
text: Forty-year high inflation, negative sentiment, and the Fed have created a rough year for the markets, especially tech. But some zombie tech stocks may be poised for a rebound. From dead to undead, businesses have been kept alive by cheap and easy credit. The U.S. economy contracted for two consecutive quarters, with retrenched companies, but latest GDP accelerated 2.6%.

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) is a Top-Ranked Growth Stock: Should You Buy?
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: Is GoDaddy (GDDY) a Solid Growth Stock? 3 Reasons to Think "Yes"
text: GoDaddy (GDDY) is well positioned to outperform the market, as it exhibits above-average growth in financials.

title: Go Long On GoDaddy, Expanded Services Can Solve Its Slowing Growth
text: The quantitative AI platform of Seeking Alpha only rates GoDaddy as a Hold. My takeaway is that it should be a buy. GoDaddy remains the top web hosting firm despite stiff challenge from AWS and Google Cloud.

title: GoDaddy Inc. to Announce Third Quarter 2022 Financial Results on Thursday, November 3, 2022
text: TEMPE, Ariz. , Oct. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY), the company that empowers everyday entrepreneurs, will release financial results for the third quarter on Thursday, November 3, 2022, after the U.S. stock market closes.
